name: obsidian-pi-vault-mind
description: Vault Mind side panel for Obsidian — live queue, status, search, and chat for the pi-vault-mind extension.
author: Kyle Brodeur

scripts.package: node esbuild.config.mjs production && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); for (const f of ['main.js','manifest.json','styles.css','README.md','LICENSE','THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md','versions.json']) fs.copyFileSync(f,'dist/'+f);"
